Collect customer reviews, send survey in: Collect customer reviews, send survey invitations, and pull rating data from ProvenExpert.
Connect your ProvenExpert account to acc:
Connect your ProvenExpert account to access reviews, surveys, and invitations.

**How to get your API credentials:**
1. Log in to your [ProvenExpert account](https://www.provenexpert.com/).
2. Go to **integrations ** from the left side panel.
3.  Copy your **Username** and **API Key**.
4. Paste them into the fields below.
Retrieves the overall rating value and t: Retrieves the overall rating value and total review count for your ProvenExpert profile.
Generates a personalised, one-time-use s: Generates a personalised, one-time-use survey link that you can send to a customer.
Sends a survey invitation email through: Sends a survey invitation email through ProvenExpert to a single recipient. A 7-day reminder is sent automatically unless disabled.
Returns all surveys on your ProvenExpert: Returns all surveys on your ProvenExpert profile with their codes, names, and share links.
Retrieves the company and contact detail: Retrieves the company and contact details of your ProvenExpert profile.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Pick the survey to use. Surveys are crea: Pick the survey to use. Surveys are created in your ProvenExpert account under the Surveys section.
Email address of the customer who will r: Email address of the customer who will receive the survey link. The link is tied to this address.
Optional full name of the recipient. Use: Optional full name of the recipient. Used to personalise the survey experience.
Email address that should receive the in: Email address that should receive the invitation.
Optional full name of the recipient — us: Optional full name of the recipient — used to address them in the email.
Optional custom subject line for the inv: Optional custom subject line for the invitation. Leave empty to use the survey default.
Optional custom greeting line (e.g. \"Hi: Optional custom greeting line (e.g. "Hi Jane,"). Leave empty to use the survey default.
Optional custom message body. Leave empt: Optional custom message body. Leave empty to use the survey default body.
When enabled, ProvenExpert sends a remin: When enabled, ProvenExpert sends a reminder email after 7 days if the recipient has not responded.
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
